textByHash.1fe5fba5b08e66c50db5f03663134175a2438f84: Do you have anything to capture some runic energy with?
textByHash.210b5b74e2e8c6b786811b1c8562a67eeb2717e4: Oh, fascinating! I guess it makes sense that the stronger the runic energy, the more powerful the cell will be. After all, water is more powerful than air or mind.
textByHash.22cc28a92c49ac8349d0c876a0e4310dca162222: I remember reading about something called the Eye back at the Wizards' Tower! I only came across mention of it once, but apparently it was a powerful artefact made by Saradomin himself!
textByHash.2651d6bafada298cede897cf5069f0f4b3260a4b: Not yet, but their mere presence here is an amazing discovery!
textByHash.2887183a94fc83401e45e5cbc544e5fd955fae25: The essence piles here contain lots of rift guardian parts.
textByHash.28dff2af9eb0c544cb6dc0b75f1c34f0addfc6a0: And we're still using that symbol today! We just never knew why until now!
textByHash.2ae55ec1769b84be8d71800f9fece7430173c072: Let's charge the guardian with those stones you created and close this rift!
textByHash.3151c64d134065ece0249363990178a15fb821a5: I've opened a portal to the huge guardian fragment mine to the south!
textByHash.327b1d93e1a9b354472bf5aaa472775e4489312f: Perhaps it's a slayer creature? Or a person? Is this a logical puzzle, a riddle or a mathematical problem?
textByHash.340c6cefcea6808fd4d14859f6f6f634bfb2c102: It worked! This barrier should protect us against those creatures!
textByHash.386bc31e2de05468c7e582a84ac34ce8b91aab98: Of course! We can use the rune guardians! See all the fallen guardians around here? They'd have once been powered using runic energy!
textByHash.39dfb6e44384a40f5c00dea8a00909c67470ff3f: Just as I thought! We can create better barriers by using stronger cells!
textByHash.3d8b7a75af45d2ff6917f2a59649b57f35fd9ca9: Please let us help! We've all worked so hard for an opportunity like this!
textByHash.3ea651027bb5dd811d76f71396deb60d478232d0: Just use those stones to power up the guardian again.
textByHash.3efef8a5170c0691f7ec83207d4cda8af97a3fd3: What do we do now? What if more of those creatures come through that rift?
textByHash.3fb664636715c6d41f7734809bd0e4b9448c80cf: Well, despite their age, they're actually of a remarkably similar design to the ones used by modern wizards. Isn't that amazing?
textByHash.48224d74299f7d5a9e0d4390092f880c309cc7b7: Try mining some fragments from the fallen guardians. Once you have a few, go and speak to Felix. I'm sure he'll be able to help you use them.
textByHash.486a875202654b39d0770972b7a1b2cbac4199f2: That must be one of the cells we need! Try placing it in the tile next to me.
textByHash.48edf3038a1d2a04440be53a15e849ed145799ab: Looks like the portal to the Mind Altar has closed. I guess the guardian only keeps them open for so long. You'll need to use the new portal instead. Make sure you take another uncharged cell with you.
textByHash.494501fe0f36858ead819f0c402a91a4163b3599: And just in time too. Here come more of them!
textByHash.4a892f3382965fe37c3cd1f8c071c75ef973f465: Just present that talisman to the statue where the portal to the Water Altar was. Make sure you take more essence and another cell with you.
textByHash.4ae7b8aff2abd5bc23b19b2d1ea4761a3361e512: Ooh! Did you say a teleportation matrix? Teleportation magic is my specialty! I'd love to help!
textByHash.4c3d8e9028af0ba52ec3ab25ac528371af5bc695: I guess we need to repeat the process again.
textByHash.4cb1fc67836a776499e63f331003f77542002211: I have a theory to test.
textByHash.4d0ae68959ec2e7baf99051778322613ed79f3ad: What is it? The rift will open soon and we should all be preparing to close it.
textByHash.4e4d90bb25b6cbf2a585b213729acc710c542038: Imbued rocks? What does that mean?
textByHash.5002039ad8625625f0a65784e6e065a981a1c183: Imbued essence can only be made at altars. Keep an eye out for the right altars to open!
textByHash.5179fef9e7e66fc2c0ef885c81e84ddcb3bec8cb: Try making another rune guardian using that cell. In the meantime, I'll see if I can work out what this talisman does.
textByHash.523a402d02a5218bfbe253e288632b606d85a199: Traiborn says I'm allowed to help you now. Let's find this teleportation matrix! I think you need to speak to Sedridor in the basement first though.
textByHash.538f0e170587b9db08277062e68d0c0602be6992: There's some old rune guardians here with eye symbols on them.
textByHash.56d1c0b837988557d6152894d7fdf75da6f9b65d: Exactly! Hopefully you can find a pickaxe somewhere. Once you have a few fragments, go and speak to Felix. I'm sure he'll be able to help you use them.
textByHash.5984bcab1a88fb0a9b0520d8899d572c447d81b4: I've opened a portal to the huge guardian fragment mine to the east!
textByHash.5a08e981e067703b935e0af75be0ec4b9cb7209a: Now, let's charge the guardian with those stones you created and close this rift!
textByHash.5a8ed8698d7e159c003d9133d4f5f94c1ff6ff11: What was all that? What happened?
textByHash.6458ddd031cb6ee0249d16adea5e33dca37d9203: Great! We're almost there! I think we just need to power up this guardian one more time for it to be able to close that rift.
textByHash.65fc6bdbd4ad3b32773d9d671e4da4b48ec97869: Perfect! Now we just need to capture some runic energy with it.
textByHash.6d0d9cca0901ff57fc39bba42f91add553ac7eaf: I'm not sure. The barrier won't hold out for long!
textByHash.72f2a8fda98ada2b3d33beb7b3914a86edab1efd: Air and earth? What about water and fire? Is this an elemental problem, or are they completely irrelevant?
textByHash.7733552757a9664392b3a56ef6853e8948dd0116: I'll no longer close the barrier once the rift opens.
textByHash.7b1441189529346bd86fb7907acb165902091b9c: That's what the book said. Why?
textByHash.7b722b15fc4901f109ad7f598b7742dcfb304901: Hmm... I don't think they'll work for this. We'll need something else...
textByHash.7c8be607fc5cfcee9bc50254acf57db75371997f: I've opened a portal to the huge guardian fragment mine to the south west!
textByHash.7e89ea3c5c015ddb3b52595301418eb2edb90f82: I'll close the barrier once the rift opens. If you change your mind before the rift opens I can revert this.
textByHash.80c3ac5a9885c696a90c84dfb7a3a3d214b6a7dd: Oh, sorry! Didn't see you there.
textByHash.83df2dce899166a795c4b1804255f0511ce28c21: Head to the Mind Altar and craft some runes. That essence you made should capture some of the runic energy released. Take an uncharged cell with you as well.
textByHash.88ade7a05a4241aabb54a6c7fd946e7d344d9432: Yes, I just can't wrap my head around it. It feels like there are too many unknown variables. Besides, how does all this relate to a thingummywut in the first place? Whatever that actually is.
textByHash.8f73152f648c57b98f08f4d6938a79361c038fcb: No. This was our mistake. I'm staying to help fix it.
textByHash.91bc6d8bfb2b3ef03a72599319351e7ae36b3765: Why would you want to do that? Wouldn't more help be appreciated?
textByHash.94dbc3228636cc36f844c85fde9885b6b936d8b2: The cells here can be used to power up barriers and rift guardians!
textByHash.a2a0f1eabf03bf5501192f717ac02c91fad5f430: Use some more of that essence to capture energy from the Water Altar. You should then be able to use it to power up the guardian again. Make sure you take another uncharged cell with you.
textByHash.a2b607f5ce7a9fe20adc13d35aba9257942196aa: Well... I guess that's your answer. Head to the Mind Altar and craft some runes. That essence you have should capture some of the runic energy released. Take an uncharged cell with you as well.
textByHash.a348bd146369bf55876a6b4cf2767388861abcab: I had a feeling it would! It's all coming together!
textByHash.a5637fc5bfab9645843b29badb910f4f3253691b: Great! That's exactly what I was hoping for. What about the cell?
textByHash.a5f98834a47542e0f8479dcb2712fdef9b6f822f: Take uncharged cells with you to charge them at altars!
textByHash.a7604d6949c242500e162ee2eeeaad2b44c4266c: Then just use those stones to power up this big guardian.
textByHash.ac977af68be130d95a094005ba4600352741dd29: Remember to combine guardian fragments with pure essence!
textByHash.b87d2d1ac3dd3791fc6499694028e9d065e5ec08: Take them to Felix. He'll hopefully know what to do with them.
textByHash.bae20b4de0946787ef98815975eca98d6002796d: If you were to obtain some fragments from them, you might be able to make something to capture the runic energy needed.
textByHash.bf41795ff0c7886278ee87414ddf852027f2a044: I'm not sure... It sounds like cheating, but I really do want to beat Cordelia. She's always one step ahead of me, so it would be nice to finally win for a change.
textByHash.c12808f1974331767e04cac34ff44a69ed925b16: First, you should use that new cell to replace the one powering the barrier here. I don't think the current one will last much longer.
textByHash.c1ddf27a39b7709ffe1028ee9c403380095e9d09: I'm not sure that would be a good idea right now.
textByHash.ca81d214e6215b43b4eaeffad0eadb6e25ef7f2e: Just use those stones to power up this big guardian.
textByHash.cbecd0e32262ae9edb741bd42b70187a0b6433cb: , could you go back to the Wizards' Tower and let Sedridor know what happened here?
textByHash.cfd59bb4760a31e388f5b2fc725480e3701da105: That's right! If my theory is correct, it should produce an even stronger barrier!
textByHash.d5ac1cd83ad2eda03ee1df567c8f0b4d8f7621f7: Don't forget that different cells produce different rift guardians!
textByHash.d985d13fa81632ecd2e1b2c8d17f8ab67ab2df0c: Wait, but we all had different puzzles written down?
textByHash.da9286ca3b7f8ca85f07dd92106726ea97300fd2: Try placing that cell in the tile next to me.
textByHash.dbb2a197368417b7ad121a6f45c161b4d56ff862: Look! Rune guardians, like the ones at the Mage Training Arena! If this place was once a teleportation matrix, these rune guardians might have helped the wizards that used it.
textByHash.e071dd8cecb3d2b09480d5791f75939fd950b9a2: Oh, didn't see you there. I'm a little busy trying to solve the puzzle Traiborn gave us. If you have any questions, you should ask him instead.
textByHash.e076ee48d0561006a11d7238fe4559a65924d09e: Don't worry, I think there's another way. I reckon that talisman you gave me can be used to return to the Water Altar without the portal being open.
textByHash.e50a2bf25093939fb5108fdd27560ec4ba7afe2b: Sure! Just please don't tell the others you helped me.
textByHash.e7b77f4a543a679c6752e4dde0c85def0e1243d6: It seems we're deep below the sea, just south of Morytania!
textByHash.f1167044dd6025932b673d4b79c50d64e2ee7b4b: Create some more of that essence and use it to capture energy from the Water Altar. You should then be able to use it to power up the guardian again. Make sure you take another uncharged cell with you.
textByHash.f1cf44be49fba6a1a859018e1c245be6d1ea2160: It didn't. It didn't actually have any other information on it. I tried to learn more from other books, but found nothing.
textByHash.f44a449ff221b663ecbc8a59e7018242dcb61a53: Try making another rune guardian using that new cell. In the meantime, I'll see if I can work out what this talisman does.
textByHash.fd2f93cc5a56968bb084cc692a2a331a69e35add: Let me cast a locator spell!
textByHash.fe623d948d0b3887dacbd5e960ef6b143e7e5be6: I've opened a portal to the huge guardian fragment mine to the south east!
